## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Biologica and GrowthX to discuss content pipeline improvements and new deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content pipeline producing higher quality articles with improved intros, clinically-backed content, and well-integrated CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Discussing potential need for citations vs. links in articles due to regulatory considerations](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [New image generation process aligning visuals more closely with article topics and target demographics](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Exploring ways to leverage article content for Shopify's new Knowledge Base tool](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [15 new articles produced with better intros, solid clinically-backed content, and graceful outros](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [CTAs well-integrated, using language to transition from concepts to product recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Sentence complexity to be gradually increased for more natural flow](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Positive feedback on intro paragraphs, which previously needed the most work](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Medical Terminology and Accessibility

  - [Discussion on balancing medical terms (e.g., "visceral hypersensitivity") with reader accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Considering hyperlinks to definitions for more complex terms](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Aiming to maintain a professional tone while providing resources for readers to learn more](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Regulatory Considerations

  - [Potential need to adjust how products are mentioned in articles due to regulatory concerns](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Discussing the possibility of using citations instead of links, similar to other supplement companies](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [GrowthX can adapt content to include citations if required, without significant pipeline changes](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Visual Content Updates

  - [New image generation process aligning visuals with article topics and target demographics](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Tweaking top-line images to be more nonspecific with tighter crops and less defined facial features](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Developing interstitial images with botanical, blurred, grainy, ethereal feel](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Ensuring images match the described demographic (e.g., appropriate age range for perimenopausal topics)](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Website Integration and Formatting

  - [Articles now being published as drafts on the website for review](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Need to update author information, publication dates, and other metadata](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Addressing font and color inconsistencies in the published drafts](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

### Shopify Knowledge Base Integration

  - [Exploring the possibility of generating FAQs from article content for Shopify's new Knowledge Base tool](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [Considering adding FAQ generation to the content deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Manual copy-paste process proposed for transferring FAQs to Shopify platform](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Liz and Brian to review newly published article drafts and provide feedback on visuals and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Brian to get clarity on regulatory requirements for product mentions and citations in articles](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Matthew to investigate Shopify's Knowledge Base tool and explore FAQ generation possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue refining image generation process for interstitial images](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Team to review updated writing guidelines and company context artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/zV8wJ3TaDoL-ydZPFVQz2-RvAMjroLD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
